sentences.target: Le chat surgit de dessous le canapé.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃa syʁʒi də dəsu lə kanape/

translations.fr: Le chat surgit de dessous le canapé.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃa syʁʒi də dəsu lə kanape/
translations.en: The cat pops out from under the couch.
translations.es: El gato sale de debajo del sofá de repente.
translations.de: Die Katze kommt plötzlich unter dem Sofa hervor.
translations.it: Il gatto spunta da sotto il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 猫从沙发底下突然钻出来。
translations.yue: 隻貓喺梳化底下忽然彈出嚟。
translations.pt: O gato sai debaixo do sofá de repente.
translations.vi: Con mèo bất ngờ chui ra từ dưới ghế sofa.
translations.ar: تخرج القطة فجأة من تحت الأريكة.
translations.nl: De kat schiet plotseling onder de bank vandaan.
translations.hu: A macska hirtelen előugrik a kanapé alól.
translations.hi: बिल्ली अचानक सोफ़े के नीचे से निकल आती है.
translations.el: Η γάτα πετάγεται ξαφνικά κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Katten spretter plutselig fram fra under sofaen.
translations.id: Kucing itu tiba-tiba muncul dari bawah sofa.
translations.sv: Katten hoppar plötsligt fram från under soffan.
translations.ro: Pisica iese brusc de sub canapea.
translations.da: Katten springer pludselig frem fra under sofaen.
translations.fi: Kissa ponnahtaa yhtäkkiä esiin sohvan alta.
translations.ja: 猫がソファの下から突然飛び出す。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'chat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'surgit'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Preposition marking origin; introduces the complement 'dessous le canapé'.
Adverb used with 'de' to form the complex prepositional phrase 'de dessous' ('from underneath').
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'canapé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the prepositional phrase ('de dessous le canapé').

sentences.target: Une idée surgit pendant la réunion.

translations.fr: Une idée surgit pendant la réunion.
translations.en: An idea comes up during the meeting.
translations.es: Surge una idea durante la reunión.
translations.de: Während der Besprechung kommt eine Idee auf.
translations.it: Durante la riunione salta fuori un’idea.
translations.zh-Hans: 开会时突然冒出一个想法。
translations.yue: 開會嗰陣突然有個主意彈出嚟。
translations.ru: Во время совещания внезапно возникает идея.
translations.pt: Durante a reunião surge uma ideia.
translations.tr: Toplantı sırasında bir fikir ortaya çıkıyor.
translations.vi: Trong cuộc họp, bất chợt nảy ra một ý tưởng.
translations.nl: Tijdens de vergadering komt er ineens een idee op.
translations.uk: Під час наради раптово виникає ідея.
translations.hu: A megbeszélés közben hirtelen felmerül egy ötlet.
translations.hi: बैठक के दौरान अचानक एक विचार सूझता है.
translations.pl: W trakcie spotkania nagle pojawia się pomysł.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια της συνάντησης προκύπτει ξαφνικά μια ιδέα.
translations.nb: Under møtet dukker det plutselig opp en idé.
translations.id: Selama rapat, tiba-tiba muncul sebuah ide.
translations.sv: Under mötet dyker det plötsligt upp en idé.
translations.ro: În timpul ședinței apare brusc o idee.
translations.cs: Během schůzky se najednou objeví nápad.
translations.da: Under mødet dukker der pludselig op en idé.
translations.ja: 会議中に突然アイデアが浮かぶ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'idée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'surgit'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pendant'.

translations.en: You always show up without warning.
translations.de: Du tauchst immer ohne Vorwarnung auf.
translations.ko: 넌 늘 예고도 없이 불쑥 나타나.
translations.zh-Hans: 你总是不打招呼就出现。
translations.yue: 你成日唔打聲招呼就出現。
translations.tr: Her zaman haber vermeden ortaya çıkıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn lúc nào cũng xuất hiện mà không báo trước.
translations.nl: Je komt altijd opdagen zonder te waarschuwen.
translations.hi: तुम हमेशा बिना बताए आ जाते हो.
translations.nb: Du dukker alltid opp uten å si fra.
translations.id: Kamu selalu muncul tanpa memberi tahu.
translations.sv: Du dyker alltid upp utan att säga till.
translations.da: Du dukker altid op uden at give besked.
translations.ja: あなたはいつも前触れもなく現れる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'surgis'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'surgis'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb governed by 'sans'; non-finite complement meaning 'to warn'.

sentences.target: Je le vois surgir au coin de la rue.
sentences.reading: /ʒə lə vwa syʁʒiʁ o kwɛ̃ də la ʁy/

translations.fr: Je le vois surgir au coin de la rue.
translations.ipa: /ʒə lə vwa syʁʒiʁ o kwɛ̃ də la ʁy/
translations.en: I see him pop out at the street corner.
translations.es: Lo veo aparecer de repente en la esquina.
translations.de: Ich sehe ihn an der Straßenecke plötzlich auftauchen.
translations.it: Lo vedo spuntare all’angolo della strada.
translations.ko: 나는 그가 길 모퉁이에서 불쑥 나타나는 걸 본다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看见他在街角突然冒出来。
translations.yue: 我見到佢喺街角突然出現。
translations.ru: Я вижу, как он внезапно появляется на углу улицы.
translations.pt: Eu o vejo aparecer de repente na esquina.
translations.he: אני רואה אותו פתאום מגיח בפינת הרחוב.
translations.tr: Onu sokak köşesinde aniden ortaya çıkarken görüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy anh ấy bất ngờ xuất hiện ở góc phố.
translations.ar: أراه يظهر فجأة عند زاوية الشارع.
translations.nl: Ik zie hem plotseling opduiken op de straathoek.
translations.uk: Я бачу, як він раптово з’являється на розі вулиці.
translations.hu: Látom, ahogy hirtelen felbukkan az utcasarkon.
translations.hi: मैं उसे सड़क के मोड़ पर अचानक निकलते हुए देखता हूँ.
translations.pl: Widzę, jak nagle pojawia się na rogu ulicy.
translations.el: Τον βλέπω να πετάγεται ξαφνικά στη γωνία του δρόμου.
translations.nb: Jeg ser ham plutselig dukke opp på gatehjørnet.
translations.id: Aku melihat dia tiba-tiba muncul di pojok jalan.
translations.sv: Jag ser honom plötsligt dyka upp i gathörnet.
translations.ro: Îl văd cum apare brusc la colțul străzii.
translations.cs: Vidím ho, jak se náhle objevuje na rohu ulice.
translations.da: Jeg ser ham pludselig dukke op på gadehjørnet.
translations.fi: Näen hänen yhtäkkiä ilmestyvän kadun kulmassa.
translations.ja: 彼が街角で突然現れるのが見える。

Preposition introducing the complement 'la rue'.

Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.
